corporate espionage.text: Industrial espionage, also known as economic espionage, corporate spying, or corporate espionage , is a form of espionage conducted for commercial purposes
orchestrated by governments and is international in scope, industrial or corporate espionage is more often national and occurs between companies or corporations.
